feed.title: Laboratory of Oral Mucosal Immunity
feed.subtitle: Website for the Laboratory of Oral Mucosal Immunity @ U of MN

entry.title: New member
entry.content: Our newest member, Bria Mills, has joined the lab. Bria is an undergraduate student interested in a career in dentistry. Welcome!
entry.summary: Our newest member, Bria Mills, has joined the lab. Bria is an undergraduate student interested in a career in dentistry. Welcome!

entry.title: New member
entry.content: Melanie has decided to stay in the lab for her graduate training. Melanie is a PhD student in the Microbiology, Immunology and Cancer Biology program. So excited to get started!
entry.summary: Melanie has decided to stay in the lab for her graduate training. Melanie is a PhD student in the Microbiology, Immunology and Cancer Biology program. So excited to get started!

entry.title: New publication
entry.content: Vasilis’ paper, “Distinct spatial organization governs oral mucosal immunity “ is published in Nature Immunology! Check it out at doi: 10.1038/s41590-025-02398-y
entry.summary: Vasilis’ paper, “Distinct spatial organization governs oral mucosal immunity “ is published in Nature Immunology! Check it out at doi: 10.1038/s41590-025-02398-y

entry.title: New award
entry.content: Drake won the Early Career Investigator ‘best talk’ award at the 25th annual Mark Wilson Conference in Nassau, Bahamas!
entry.summary: Drake won the Early Career Investigator ‘best talk’ award at the 25th annual Mark Wilson Conference in Nassau, Bahamas!

entry.title: New Member
entry.content: Our newest member, Nejma Muhumed, has joined the lab. Nejma is an undergraduate student interested in a career in dentistry. Happy to have you with us!
entry.summary: Our newest member, Nejma Muhumed, has joined the lab. Nejma is an undergraduate student interested in a career in dentistry. Happy to have you with us!

entry.title: Rotation student
entry.content: Melanie Barksdale will be spending the next several weeks in our lab for a rotation. Melanie is a PhD student in the Microbiology, Immunology and Cancer Biology program. Welcome and enjoy your time here!
entry.summary: Melanie Barksdale will be spending the next several weeks in our lab for a rotation. Melanie is a PhD student in the Microbiology, Immunology and Cancer Biology program. Welcome and enjoy your time here!

entry.title: New Member
entry.content: Our newest member, Alexis Macuna, has joined the lab. Alexis is an undergraduate student studying Nutrition at UMN. Happy to have you with us!
entry.summary: Our newest member, Alexis Macuna, has joined the lab. Alexis is an undergraduate student studying Nutrition at UMN. Happy to have you with us!

entry.title: New Member
entry.content: Our newest member, Justin Lehtinen, has joined the lab. Justin is a PhD student in Bioengineering, co-mentored by Brittany Hartwell. Let’s do some science!
entry.summary: Our newest member, Justin Lehtinen, has joined the lab. Justin is a PhD student in Bioengineering, co-mentored by Brittany Hartwell. Let’s do some science!

entry.title: New Member
entry.content: Our newest member, Kevin Cunningham, has joined the lab. Kevin is a PhD student from the Bioinformatics and Computational Biology program. Welcome to the team!
entry.summary: Our newest member, Kevin Cunningham, has joined the lab. Kevin is a PhD student from the Bioinformatics and Computational Biology program. Welcome to the team!

entry.title: New Member
entry.content: Our inagural member, Shashwata Biswas, has joined the lab. Shashwata is a post-doc who did his PhD in Japan. Welcome aboard!
entry.summary: Our inagural member, Shashwata Biswas, has joined the lab. Shashwata is a post-doc who did his PhD in Japan. Welcome aboard!
